🎉 Create a Board

Spread Joy this
Festive Season

Bring the whole company together for the holidays. Share festive cheer, family updates, and warm wishes on a massive, collaborative digital board.

Create a Holiday BoardView an Example
★ The perfect way to wrap up the year as a team
YEAR IN REVIEW🎁

"Our global holiday board was amazing! Reading messages and seeing everyone's holiday traditions from all over the world was the highlight of my year."

T
M
A
+102
Signed by 105 colleagues

How it works

Four festive steps to wrap up the year with joy

Create Board

Start a festive holiday board for the entire team or department

1Dashboard

Gather Cheers

Collect holiday photos, family updates, and festive cheers

2Collaborate

Holiday Book

A beautifully printed holiday memory book shipped to the office

3Keepsake

Celebrate!

Share a private link, export as PDF and ring in the new year

4Share

Hover over each card to explore

Global Festive Cheers

The entire company celebrates together! Holiday cheers and end-of-year greetings are shared across all international offices.

“
A

Aryan Bhatia

Engineering Lead📍 New Delhi, India
1 hour ago

“ Wishing you and your loved ones a joyful festive season filled with happiness, prosperity, and unforgettable moments. Have a wonderful celebration! ”
